content: 2024–2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be rearchitected to treat the agent's own developmental trajectory as an episodic memory query dataset, where curiosity-driven exploration signals act as active learning acquisition functions to prioritize which of the agent's past self-states are stored and retrieved for future planning. This creates a self-improving loop where the agent grows its memory capacity by actively learning about its own learning process, rather than only learning about external environments.
